title: World Development Indicators (WDI) — full bulk CSV download
countries: ALL (world; includes IRN, KOR, TUR, SAU, VEN, DEU, FRA, GBR, ITA, ESP, NLD, SWE)
license_terms: CC BY-4.0 (World Bank open data terms)
notes: Full all-country bulk download (natural download unit; kept whole per bookkeeping size discipline). Zip retained; the 6 CSVs were extracted from WDI_CSV.zip into this folder at download time — their download_url is the zip URL. Zip server last-modified 2026-06-30 (June 2026 WDI release). WDICSV.csv is the main data file (wide format, one column per year 1960–2025, 398,469 rows, 1,498 rows for IRN). WDISeries.csv = indicator metadata/codebook; WDICountry.csv = country metadata; WDIfootnote.csv = cell-level footnotes.
